name: Summer workshop special kit
desc:
This Summer Workshop Special Kit is carefully curated for beginners and enthusiasts to explore electronics, robotics, and IoT. It includes all essential components required to build and experiment with real-world projects.

Kit Includes:
- 1 × ESP8266 Wi-Fi Module
- 1 × Arduino Uno
- 2 × Data Cables
- 1 × Breadboard
- 25 × Male-to-Male Jumper Wires
- 20 × Male-to-Female Jumper Wires
- 5 × Female-to-Female Jumper Wires
- 10 × LEDs
- 5 × 220Ω Resistors
- 5 × 10KΩ Resistors
- 3 × Push Buttons
- 2 × IR Sensors
- 1 × Ultrasonic Sensor
- 1 × Single Channel Relay Module
- 1 × Robot Chassis
- 1 × L298N Motor Driver
- 2 × Rechargeable Batteries
- 1 × Battery Holder
- 1 × Charger

Note: Image is for illustration purposes only. Actual product may vary slightly.

name: IR Sensor Obstacle Avoidance Infrared Reflection Photoelectric Sensor Module Infrared Sensor
Official Arduino UNO Q Single Board Computer Model 2GB ABX00162
